raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I applied for a Home Depot credit card to purchase windows for my property. I was approved, I received a receipt for the transaction and on XX/XX/XXXX a HD representative arrived at my property to take measurements of the windows. Home Depot advised that I would receive the windows within 6-8 weeks. Within XXXX week, I received a credit card statement to pay for the window purchase and the first payment was due on XX/XX/XXXX. I called the bank issuer to advise that I had not received the product I purchased, therefore I did not understand why a payment would be due, but they advised that this is their policy and that I needed to dispute the issue with Home Depot. On XX/XX/XXXX, after numerous calls to Home Depot ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX ), I received an email advising that the measurements for my windows had been received and that my windows would be ready within 6-8 weeks. Meanwhile, I have been making monthly payments for a product I am still not in receipt of. The company has been uncooperative, unresponsive and illegally demanding payment for a product that they are refusing to deliver. Unfortunately, I'm forced to continue making payments so that my credit rating will not negatively be affected and I'm being forced to pay for a product I'm not going to receive. The Home Depot is not willing to reimburse me for their inability to abide by their contractual agreement which is to provide the product that I paid for with 6-8 weeks after the measurement of the windows. This problem is a financial burden for me and Home Depot is not cooperating nor are they responsive. Home Depot is illegally stealing money from me and I need for this to stop and get rectified.
